name: Violence Risk Assessment
description: Evaluates aggressive thoughts, violent tendencies, and risk of harm to others

questions.text: Do you often feel angry or irritated?
Do you sometimes have thoughts about hurting others?
Do you have difficulty controlling your temper?
Have you been in physical fights in the past year?
Do you enjoy watching violent movies or games?
Do you feel like hitting things when you're frustrated?
Do you sometimes threaten others when angry?
Do you have access to weapons?

terminationRules.name: Early Violence Screening
terminationRules.description: Skip remaining questions if no initial violence indicators
